expected_effect: Recover mild-imbalance retail flow while preserving protection once one-sided flow becomes materially large.
rationale: Microstructure theory says execution intensity decays rapidly with quote distance, so mild common-fee taxes can cost disproportionate flow. Pivot away from extra inventory skew and instead add a deadband to the shared one-sided flow carry so only larger imbalances widen the common spread.
title: Shared flow deadband pivot
